name: Active Complex - with FORTIGEL® & AquaLOX®
description_html:
Our Active Complex supports joint mobility, improves joint comfort, and reduces muscle soreness in less than 2 weeks.**† Vital Proteins Active Complex includes FORTIGEL® and AquaLOX®, ingredients that are recognized for their role in supporting joint health and mobility.

Our collagen peptides are sourced from the hides of grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine to ensure a high-quality source of this powerful ingredient. Includes FORTIGEL®, a specially processed collagen that has been clinically shown when taken over time to help reduce knee pain during exercise in fit, active individuals and AquaLOX® which helps reduce muscle soreness in less than two weeks.**†

Just mix one serving in your daily coffee, tea, smoothie, and the like.

†Based on use of AquaLOX® in association with exercise.
**These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: Advanced Collagen Peptides + Colostrum + Prebiotic Fiber
description_html: Our 3-in-1 advanced powder blend. It promotes gut health with prebiotic fiber.** It supports your immune system with bovine colostrum.** It also features Verisol® Collagen to reduce fine lines and wrinkles in just 30 days**

name: Advanced Collagen Peptides + Creatine - Strawberry Lemon
description_html:
We amped up the benefits of our best-selling collagen. Our Collagen and Creatine blend is formulated to support joints, build muscle and help you recover after exercise.**^ All this while supporting brain health.**‡

^In combination with resistance exercise

‡Studies show that creatine may support brain health in vegetarians and aging individuals

description_html: Vital Proteins® Beef Gelatin is sourced from the hides of pasture-raised, grass-fed bovine. Unlike our Collagen Peptides, this gelatin powder gels in cold liquids, serving as a thickening agent in recipes.

name: Beef Liver - Capsules
description_html: Liver is nature's most concentrated source of vitamin A and is a vital nutrient for skin health. Vital Proteins® Beef Liver capsules are sourced from grass-fed cows.

name: Bone & Joint Support - Unflavored
description_html:
Bioactive Collagen Complex Bone & Joint Support** optimizes joint functionality to support mobility and comfort.** It provides joints, bones and muscles with clinically demonstrated levels of collagen peptides, hyaluronic acid and an evidence-based blend of micronutrients.** This clinical formulation was developed as a complement to professional therapies for those who seek advanced support for muscles, tendons, ligaments, bones, tissue and joints.**

 

Read the Product and Research Guide for Healthcare Professionals

 


**These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Cartilage Collagen - Capsules
description_html: Vital Proteins' Cartilage Collagen is rich in Type II Collagen Peptides and Glycosaminoglycans, including naturally occurring Chondroitin Sulfate. (We know it's a mouthful, but trust us...it's awesome.)

name: Chocolate Collagen Peptides
description_html:
Collagen for your wellness goals. Chocolate for your taste buds. Craving a real treat? Scoop up our Chocolate Collagen Peptides, a decadent pairing with benefits you’ll always crave. Just stir into your favorite beverage or recipe & enjoy.

 

Prop 65 Product Disclosure

name: Collagen & Protein Shake - Ready to Drink
description_html:
Shake it up with Vital Proteins® Chocolate Collagen & Protein Shake with all the hair, skin, nail & joint benefits. A high quality 30g protein shake with collagen and no added sugar, artificial sweeteners, colors, flavors or Carrageenan. 

It's not just a protein shake. It's a chocolate collagen and protein shake with 0g sugar and no artificial colors or sweeteners.

Look, Feel & Move Your Best**

Our new 30g Collagen & Protein Shake has all the benefits you need to support healthy hair, skin, nails and joints.**^

description_html:
For wellness made easy. One serving daily support healthy hair, skin, nails, bones and joints.**^

 

Collagen Peptides ships in our NEW paperboard canisters. It’s the same collagen you love, now with 90% less plastic.ᵠ Ultimately all Vital Proteins collagen peptide powder varieties will transition from plastic packaging to paper-based canisters. Click here for more information.

name: Collagen Peptides Beauty Edition**

name: Collagen Sparkling Water
description_html:
Sip your way to better skin health in as little as 30 days.


Upgrade your hydration with Vital Proteins Collagen Sparkling Water, a refreshing, fruit-flavored sparkling water made with clinically backed VERISOL® collagen peptides and Vitamin C. Designed for daily use, this sparkling collagen drink works as good as it tastes, with 0g sugar and no artificial sweeteners.


Perfect for anyone looking to support skin health while enjoying a light, refreshing beverage, this Collagen Sparkling Water helps start improving skin health in just 30 days when consumed daily.

 

Where to find it: Now available through Instacart - shop now! The product will be available in 12-ounce cans at select retailers and 12-count variety pack at club stores (prices may vary by retailer).  Sign up here to be notified of further updates!

name: Colostrum
description_html: The benefits of colostrum, without the dry scooping. Our new colostrum capsules enhance your wellness routine, nourish your gut and support your immune health.** Colostrum is a baby mammal's first food, providing nutrients and immune support. Shortly after cows give birth‚ they release colostrum to support growing calves (but don’t worry, cows produce more colostrum than a calf needs; rather than wasting it, we use the excess colostrum).  We call this our Calf-First promise.

name: Creatine
description_html:
Our Creatine powder is formulated to fuel muscle growth and strength and supports recovery.**^ That way you can train hard and bounce back after exercise.** All this while supporting brain health.**‡


^In combination with resistance exercise

‡Studies show that creatine may support brain health in vegetarians and aging individuals

name: Daily Foundational Support - Unflavored
description_html:
Bioactive Collagen Complex Daily Foundational Support** offers a clinically backed, comprehensive approach to collagen supplementation. Developed with a team of leading nutrition experts, this daily supplement combines three types of bioactive collagen peptides with liposomal vitamin C to support collagen production.** These proven ingredients help reduce the look of fine lines and wrinkles and maintain optimal joint mobility, among other benefits.**

 

Read the Product and Research Guide for Healthcare Professionals

 

**These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Results may vary. Various studies have suggested benefits following daily consumption of collagen for several months. Refer to product labels and vitalproteins.com for recommended serving sizes and for more information.

name: Enhanced Collagen Complex
description_html:
Vital Proteins® Enhanced Collagen Complex Capsules with clinically studied BioCell Collagen® is a convenient, premium, powerhouse blend comprised of collagen, chondroitin sulfate, and hyaluronic acid designed to support skin health, joint health and mobility from the inside out.


Take 2 capsules 1-2x a day, at any time of day (60 total capsules per bottle).


BioCell CollagenTM, and BioCell Collagen®, variously in name and/or design, are trademarks of BioCell Technology, LLC, and are registered in various jurisdictions.

Not only is Vital Proteins® Ice Pop Collagen Peptides is made without gluten, dairy or soy, but it's also paleo and keto friendly.
